sql_array: CREATE TABLE remote_data AS SELECT * FROM returned_value('server_address', 'database_name.table_name') FORMAT JSON;
INSERT INTO remote_data SELECT * FROM returned_value('server_address', 'database_name.table_name') WHERE some_column = 'value';
UPDATE remote_data SET some_column = 'new_value' WHERE some_column = 'old_value';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM returned_value('server_address', 'database_name.table_name') WHERE some_condition;
DELETE FROM remote_data WHERE some_column IS NULL;
